case_title: LUIS CASTRO VS. RICHARD WAN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
